Joint Petn. For Order Of Supplemental Distribution Without Further Accounting And For Approval Of Withhold For Administrative Expenses
Off Calendar Oct-02-2007 Continued To Nov-06-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: James Feutz appearing for co-petitioners Henry Leleu and Loma Fox. Jonathan Ferdon appearing for the SFPA. Kathleen Strickland specially appearing for Kenneth Noblitt and the Estate of Joanne Noblitt.
Mr. Feutz reported that Mr. Johnson would not be making an appearnace today. Ms. Strickland informed the court that Mr. Johnson had filed a petition to be removed as counsel. She also expressed that she prefers to have the 1/5 Noblitt share held by the administrator rather than deposited with the clerk of the Court . Mr. Ferdon informed the court that he needs to know which attorney to mail the IRS refund to. A revised order is to be prepared by Ms. Strickland, approved as to form by all parties and submitted. The Court continued the matter to 11/06/07 for status on filing of the order.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Bailiff: Tony Aguerre Clerk: Rosie Noguera

Joint Petn. For Order Of Supplemental Distribution Without Further Accounting And For Approval Of Withhold For Administrative Expenses
Off Calendar Sep-11-2007 Continued To Oct-02-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: James Feutz appearing for co-petitioners Henri Leleu and Loma Fox. Jonathan Ferdon appearing for the Administrator of the estate. Mark Johnson appearing for Kenneth Noblitz, Marianne Summers, Tom Summers and Joseph Chambers.
Mr. Feutz requested a 30 day continuance. He will be able to submit an order dealing with the remaining issues which will include the waiver of accounting and distribution to the Noblitt estate to be deposited with the clerk. The matter was continued to 10/02/07.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera
